name: baby-tracker-skill
description: Alexa Skill para acompanhamento de bebê recém-nascido

scripts.deploy: npm run build && zip -r deploy.zip dist/ node_modules/ && AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1 aws lambda update-function-code --function-name ask-diriodobeb-default-default-1775661169112 --zip-file fileb://deploy.zip
